{{Infobox character
| name = Sage of Twin Stars
| introduced = Bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Sage of Twin Stars]] is associated with the [[Akura clan]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10">''Bloodline'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Sage of Twin Stars]] is a title or classification [[Jai Long]] attributes to [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18">''Bloodline'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Jai Chen]] claimed they were sent by the [[Sage of Twin Stars]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c21">''Bloodline'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Sage of Twin Stars]] is the founder and Patriarch of the [[Sect of Twin Stars]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4">''Reaper'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|“We were sent here by the Sage of Twin Stars,” Jai Chen said.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c21" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
